list.name: 141 Miles
list.description: Jersey Shore events site with an AI-written newsletter and town-level publishing engine.

list.name: Survival Signal
list.description: A newsletter about how to work independently. Currently on hiatus.

list.name: Total Emphasis Workflow
list.description: Desktop command center for managing client projects, stages, and deliverables across the ghostwriting practice.

list.name: Total Emphasis Portfolio
list.description: Portfolio and proof system for the ghostwriting business, synced from the working archive.

list.name: Control Panel
list.description: Central dashboard for tools, cron jobs, and quick actions across the Total Emphasis stack.

list.name: Client Pulse
list.description: Research feed that turns client press, market news, and competitor activity into a daily brief.

list.name: Writing
list.description: Writing-assist environment for drafting bylines and essays with vault and source-material context loaded.

list.name: Vault Chatbot
list.description: MCP server that lets Claude query the Obsidian vault used as a CRM and working archive.

list.name: Article Search
list.description: MCP server for searching indexed article sources by date, organization, publication, tag, or topic.

list.name: Ironlog
list.description: Obsidian-native fitness tracker with an MCP server, cron automation, and a lightweight phone dashboard.

list.name: Obsidian Interface
list.description: Local-first server that exposes the Obsidian vault to other tools over HTTP.

list.name: Ideas
list.description: Capture and synthesis tool for ideas, drafts, and one-line riffs that become vault notes.
